entries.name: columns
entries.description: Column-major data rendered into the SVG grid.

entries.name: cellSize
entries.description: Width and height of each square cell in SVG units.

entries.name: gap
entries.description: Space between adjacent cells in SVG units.

entries.name: labelHeight
entries.description: Vertical space reserved above the cells for custom labels.

entries.name: minContentWidth
entries.description: Minimum scrollable content width in CSS pixels.

entries.name: title
entries.description: Accessible title announced for the generated SVG.

entries.name: getKey
entries.description: Returns a stable React key for a grid position.

entries.name: renderCell
entries.description: Renders the SVG content for one grid position.

entries.name: renderLabels
entries.description: Renders optional labels inside the grid SVG.

entries.name: isInteractive
entries.description: Determines whether a position can become the active cell.

entries.name: onActiveCellChange
entries.description: Reports active-cell changes with a viewport-aware virtual anchor.

entries.name: className
entries.description: Additional classes for the scroll container.

entries.name: data
entries.description: Daily contribution records to render.

entries.name: blockMargin
entries.description: Gap between contribution blocks in SVG units.

entries.name: blockRadius
entries.description: Corner radius of each contribution block.

entries.name: blockSize
entries.description: Width and height of each contribution block.

entries.name: fontSize
entries.description: Font size used to calculate the month-label area.

entries.name: labels
entries.description: Overrides the default month, weekday, and legend labels.

entries.name: maxLevel
entries.description: Highest contribution intensity level.

entries.name: style
entries.description: Inline styles for the graph container.

entries.name: totalCount
entries.description: Overrides the total derived from the activity data.

entries.name: weekStart
entries.description: First day of the contribution week.

entries.name: children
entries.description: Composed calendar, footer, total, or legend content.

entries.name: className
entries.description: Additional classes for the graph container.

entries.name: active
entries.description: Controls whether the shader and its warm-up animation are running.

entries.name: className
entries.description: Classes applied to the shader container.

entries.name: testId
entries.description: Base test identifier used by the rendered and fallback states.

entries.name: pressed
entries.description: Shows the key in its depressed visual state.

entries.name: reactive
entries.description: Subscribes the key to live keyboard state.

entries.name: keyName
entries.description: Physical key observed when reactive mode is enabled.

entries.name: className
entries.description: Additional classes for the key element.

entries.name: children
entries.description: Key label rendered inside the element.

entries.name: shortcut
entries.description: Key that toggles between the resolved light and dark themes.

entries.name: throttleMs
entries.description: Minimum delay between accepted shortcut presses, in milliseconds.

entries.name: ignoreInputs
entries.description: Prevents the shortcut from firing while an editable control is focused.
